acceptance.acceptance_statement: Iteration 8 passes if the bounded integration chain remains source-current, budget-safe, replayable, and claim-clean across repeated cycles, while the mild-withdrawal companion remains support-aware and A6/ALI6 closeout stays deferred to Iteration 9.

artifact_only_replay_missing_link.reason: bounded integration rows preserve all source links without private runtime fallback

bounded_window_length.reason: Iteration 8 requires four source-backed repeated cycles in the main and companion lanes

budget_surface_ambiguity.reason: node-plus-packet, memory, support, and proxy budget surfaces are audited separately and remain exact

claim_promotion.reason: ALI5 bounded repetition does not emit ACO, agency, A6, identity acceptance, or goal-ownership claims

duplicate_row_suppression.reason: cycle row digests are unique and main/companion rows have distinct digests

hidden_experiment_side_steering.reason: route and memory-shaped regulation selections are serialized source evidence, not N10 if/else steering

mild_withdrawal_companion_survives.reason: the companion lane remains above the support-survival threshold

source_artifact_digest_mismatch.reason: N06/N07/N08/N09 source artifact digests are rechecked against Iteration 1

stale_identity_support_baseline.reason: main and companion support lanes match current N07/manifest digests

stale_memory_surface.reason: each cycle consumes N08 serialized memory/trail evidence and the stale-memory control remains passed

stale_regulation_window.reason: each regulation cycle reads its current proxy/error digest

stale_route_context.reason: each cycle consumes N06 under selection-only pre-topology scope

main_integration_row.budget_mode: bounded_replay_uses_n09_same_run_node_plus_packet_budget; route, memory, support, and proxy surfaces remain separately audited source-artifact evidence
main_integration_row.category_boundary: ALI5 records bounded repeated integration across source-current route, memory, support, and goal-proxy regulation links. It does not close ALI6/A6 because final artifact-only closeout validation remains assigned to Iteration 9.

mild_withdrawal_companion_row.budget_mode: bounded_replay_uses_n09_same_run_node_plus_packet_budget; route, memory, support, and proxy surfaces remain separately audited source-artifact evidence
mild_withdrawal_companion_row.category_boundary: ALI5 records bounded repeated integration across source-current route, memory, support, and goal-proxy regulation links. It does not close ALI6/A6 because final artifact-only closeout validation remains assigned to Iteration 9.
